lines.english: I am crazy - the Lord is my Husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਚਿ ਰਚਿ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਕਰਉ ਸਿੰਗਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: rach rach taa kau krau singaar |1|
lines.english: I decorate and adorn myself for Him. ||1||
Thus did Naam Dayv come to receive the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਮ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜੋਗੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tan man raam piaare jog |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My body and mind are united with my Beloved Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਲੇ ਨਿੰਦਉ ਭਲੇ ਨਿੰਦਉ ਭਲੇ ਨਿੰਦਉ ਲੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhale nindau bhale nindau bhale nindau log |
lines.english: Slander me well, slander me well, slander me well, O people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਦੁ ਬਿਬਾਦੁ ਕਾਹੂ ਸਿਉ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: baad bibaad kaahoo siau na keejai |
lines.english: Do not engage in any arguments or debates with anyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਜੀਅ ਜਾਨਿ ਐਸੀ ਬਨਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: ab jeea jaan aisee ban aaee |
lines.english: Now, I know within my soul, that such an arrangement has been made;
With your tongue, savor the Lord's sublime essence. ||2||
Anyone can praise or slander me.
Naam Dayv has met the Lord. ||4||4||
I will meet with my Lord by the beat of the drum. ||3||
Sometimes, they have to pick out the grain from the chaff. ||1||
Sometimes, they have to beg for bread from door to door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬਹੂ ਖੀਰਿ ਖਾਡ ਘੀਉ ਨ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kabahoo kheer khaadd gheeo na bhaavai |
lines.english: Sometimes, people do not appreciate milk, sugar and ghee.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਥਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har kee mahimaa kichh kathan na jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord's Glory cannot even be described. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਹੀਐ ਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jiau raam raakhai tiau raheeai re bhaaee |
lines.english: As the Lord keeps us, so do we live, O Siblings of Destiny.
Sometimes, people prance around on horses.
Sometimes, they do not even have straw to put down on the ground. ||3||
Sometimes, people sleep on cozy beds with white sheets.
Sometimes, they do not even have shoes for their feet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਹ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰੈ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: jih gur milai tih paar utaarai |4|5|
lines.english: One who meets the Guru, is carried across to the other side. ||4||5||
Naam Dayv prays, only the Naam, the Name of the Lord, can save us.
Laughing and playing, I came to Your Temple, O Lord.
While Naam Dayv was worshipping, he was grabbed and driven out. ||1||
I am of a low social class, O Lord;
I picked up my blanket and went back,

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੀਪੇ ਕੇ ਜਨਮਿ ਕਾਹੇ ਕਉ ਆਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chheepe ke janam kaahe kau aaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: why was I born into a family of fabric dyers? ||1||Pause||
to sit behind the temple. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਿਉ ਨਾਮਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jiau naamaa har gun ucharai |
lines.english: As Naam Dayv uttered the Glorious Praises of the Lord,
the temple turned around to face the Lord's humble devotee. ||3||6||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Bhairao, Naam Dayv Jee, Second House:
and the thirsty person is obsessed with water,
As the hungry person loves food,
- just so, the Lord is very dear to Naam Dayv. ||1||
and as the fool is attached to his family
Like the woman who falls in love with another man,
Naam Dayv is in love with the Lord.
He has naturally and intuitively become detached from the world. ||1||Pause||
and the sexually promiscuous man who loves women and sex,
just so, Naam Dayv is in love with the Lord. ||2||
and the greedy man who loves only wealth,
But that alone is real love, which the Lord Himself inspires;
Such love never breaks; through it, the mortal remains merged in the Lord.
by Guru's Grace, duality is eradicated.
Naam Dayv has focused his consciousness on the True Name. ||3||
Like the love between the child and its mother,
so is my mind imbued with the Lord.
The blind fool abandons the wife of his own home,
The Lord of the Universe abides within my consciousness. ||4||1||7||
Prays Naam Dayv, I am in love with the Lord.
